name: MilkyWay / Vodka — Context & Interpretation fMRI
description: OpenNeuro dataset (ds001131) in which participants heard ambiguous spoken narratives ('MilkyWay' and 'Vodka') under different contextual primes. Designed to study how prior context shapes shared neural interpretation of the same social story.
citation: Yeshurun Y, et al. (2017). Same story, different story: the neural representation of interpretive frameworks. PNAS, 114(15), 4072–4077.
